Docs.summary: true if the domain should be automatically renewed; otherwise, false.

MemberSignature.Value: Public ReadOnly Property IsDnsRecordManagementReady As Nullable(Of Boolean)

Docs.summary: true if Azure can assign this domain to App Service apps; otherwise, false. This value will be true if domain registration status is active and \n it is hosted on name servers Azure has programmatic access to.

MemberSignature.Value: Public Property IsDomainPrivacyEnabled As Nullable(Of Boolean)
member this.IsDomainPrivacyEnabled : Nullable<bool> with get, set

Docs.summary: true if domain privacy is enabled for this domain; otherwise, false.
